name: default-uniform-1
script: This clip uses every setting from the sidebar. All override columns are blank.

name: default-uniform-2
script: This one is also uniform. Blank cells inherit from the sidebar defaults.

name: more-expressive
script: Here I drop stability to make this line sound more emotional.

name: faster-delivery
script: This clip speaks faster. Only the speed column is filled; everything else comes from the sidebar.

name: slower-and-serious
script: This one is slower AND more monotone. Both style and speed are filled on this row only.

name: back-to-default
script: After the three custom rows above, this clip is back to the sidebar defaults because all my overrides are blank again. Per-row changes do NOT cascade.

name: different-voice
script: This one uses a totally different voice. The voice_id column overrides only for this row.

name: different-voice-and-model
script: You can mix any overrides. Here I change both the voice and the model.

name: final-clip
script: One more uniform clip to show the defaults come back by themselves.
